title: Vault Gap Stub Frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of inbox/YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md stubs produced by the /vault-gap skill. Stubs must route through inbox/ → /extract → knowledge/; NEVER written directly to knowledge/. Consumed by /extract (T1), /vault-validate (T2), and /vault-health (T7).

name.description: Human-readable title ending in ' — vault-gap stub'.

description.description: Tooltip-ready one-liner. Must fit in a <VaultHoverCard> summary.

captured_date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) when /vault-gap flagged the gap.

triage_status.description: Fixed literal so /extract can filter gap-stubs from other inbox sources.

plan.description: Path to the plan file relative to repo root (e.g. 'docs/superpowers/plans/.../03-a11y-systemic.md').

task.description: Task ID within the plan (e.g. 'Wave 10 Task 10.1' or '5.9').

coverage_at_gap.description: What /vault-gap reported at stub-creation time. NOT updated as vault grows — historical marker.

strong_hits_at_gap.description: Count of qmd_deep_search results ≥ 0.5 at stub-creation time.

research_questions.description: Concrete questions /extract must answer when producing knowledge notes.

topics.description: Pre-seed topic tags. Must include 'vault-gap-seed'. /extract may add domain-specific MOC tags.

unblocks.description: T15: plan file paths this gap unblocks when extracted. Priority hint for /extract.
